searchProcess.robotsOrAccessNotes: Northwell corporate domain returned clean homepage and Research & Education hub but neither surfaces visiting-student content; Zucker SOM page at medicine.hofstra.edu is the canonical visiting-student lane for Northwell-affiliated hospitals including SIUH.

sourceEvidence.pageTitle: Visiting Students | Donald and Barbara Zucker School of Medicine at Hofstra/Northwell
sourceEvidence.captureNotes: Zucker SOM at Hofstra/Northwell visiting-student page. SIUH not explicitly named as a rotation site on this page; SIUH is a Northwell hospital so the SOM's visiting-student policy is the system-wide gate for any Northwell rotation. Specialties explicitly listed: Urology and Orthopedic Surgery (per source).

candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | Zucker SOM at Hofstra/Northwell
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Must be currently enrolled in an LCME accredited medical school or COCA accredited AACOM member college. We do not accept applicants from foreign medical schools without an affiliation agreement.
candidateFindings.durationDecision: Rotation blocks ~4-5 weeks across May 2026 — April 2027 cycle
candidateFindings.specialtyDecision: Urology and Orthopedic Surgery explicitly listed; broader catalog implied via VSLO

userFacingSummaryDraft.oneSentenceSummary: Visiting elective rotations at Northwell hospitals (including SIUH) are governed by the Zucker SOM at Hofstra/Northwell's visiting-student program, VSLO-only for MS4s enrolled in LCME or COCA schools.
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsFor: Final-year MS4 students at LCME-accredited US MD schools or COCA-accredited US DO schools, applying via VSLO with USMLE Step 1 or COMLEX pass.
userFacingSummaryDraft.whoThisIsNotFor: International medical students from foreign medical schools without an existing affiliation agreement; IMG graduates; non-final-year students.
userFacingSummaryDraft.howToApply: Apply through VSLO (https://vslo.aamc.org/vslo/) — applications open March 2 for the May 2026 — April 2027 cycle. Home school must attest to background check and provide malpractice coverage. SIUH-specific rotation availability is determined by the VSLO catalog at search time.
userFacingSummaryDraft.estimatedCostSummary: Tuition/program fee and housing not stated on source; malpractice covered by home school at $3M aggregate / $1M per instance.
keyCaveats: MS4 final year only; USMLE Step 1 or COMLEX pass required
Foreign medical schools excluded unless prior affiliation agreement
Specialties explicitly listed on the visiting page are Urology and Orthopedic Surgery; broader catalog presumed via VSLO at the SOM level
Staten Island University Hospital is not separately named as a visiting-student site on this page; the SOM-level page governs rotations at Northwell-affiliated hospitals
userFacingSummaryDraft.whyWeClassifiedItThisWay: Source explicitly limits eligibility to LCME/COCA-enrolled US MD/DO students and explicitly excludes foreign medical school applicants without affiliation. Application path is VSLO. Final-year-only. No international or IMG-graduate path disclosed.
userFacingSummaryDraft.sourceTransparencyNote: Cleaned text of the Zucker SOM visiting-student page captured to T7 canonical capsule with real SHA-256 hash. SIUH-specific page was not located; SOM-level page is the canonical lane.
userFacingSummaryDraft.possibleListingTitle: Northwell — Staten Island University Hospital (via Zucker SOM at Hofstra/Northwell) — VSLO MS4 Only
userFacingSummaryDraft.possibleMetaDescription: Visiting electives at Northwell SIUH go through the Zucker SOM at Hofstra/Northwell VSLO program — US MD/DO MS4 only, foreign schools excluded.

negativeEvidence.whetherNegativeEvidenceStrong: STRONG for international/IMG-graduate exclusion — explicit verbatim source quote
negativeEvidence.futureRetrySuggestion: Consider searching Northwell Health System internal documentation (professionals.northwell.edu) for any SIUH-specific visiting-student page; not surfaced via public navigation.

changeDetectionPrep.notes: Rotation block dates and application window will rotate annually.

driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because Northwell SIUH's VSLO-only lane via Zucker SOM was documented with verbatim eligibility/exclusion text and SHA-256 hash on the canonical T7 capsule; no DB/schema/noindex/homepage touched.
